visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a title screen featuring the Costco Wholesale logo prominently. A cartoon man with an exaggerated shocked expression appears on the left. The scene is set inside a brightly lit warehouse store with tall metal shelving filled with goods in the background. Colorful text bubbles with the brand and sale dates are overlaid on the screen. (2) A series of rapid jump cuts show various retail products on store shelves. Items include stacks of Mamy Poko diaper boxes, yellow and purple vitamin bottles, boxes of Tide detergent, and cases of Buckskin beer. Each shot is a medium-to-close-up angle focusing on the packaging. Brightly colored price tags and discount information are superimposed over each product. (3) The sequence continues through food items: plastic containers of salad, trays of raw lamb chops, salmon fillets, and various snacks and sweets. The camera moves in a handheld manner, panning across the refrigerated and shelf sections. (4) The final segment features household and toy items, concluding with a close-up of a large, soft purple Lotso plush bear sitting in a cardboard bin. The lighting throughout is consistent with bright, flat overhead commercial studio-style lighting.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main narrator's hand occasionally visible, 3 other shoppers seen in the background aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male narrator holding the camera, wearing dark clothing; only hands or reflections are occasionally visible.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of the interior of a Costco warehouse, featuring high metal industrial racks, concrete floors, and large bulk product displays.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a loud, high-energy male narrator's voice introducing the 'Costco weekly report' over a fast-tempo, upbeat pop instrumental with a strong synthetic beat. The narrator's speech rate is very fast, maintaining a cheerful and promotional tone. (2) As the video cuts between products, the narrator continues naming each item and its sale price in a continuous, breathless stream of speech. The background music maintains a consistent 132 BPM rhythm, providing a steady pulse throughout the entire 77-second duration. (3) Subtle warehouse room tone is masked by the dominant music and vocal tracks. Occasional light 'ding' sound effects punctuate specific price drops or item transitions. (4) The track concludes with the narrator's enthusiastic closing remark as the music ends abruptly, coinciding with the final visual of the Lotso plush toy.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform Costco members in Taiwan about weekly promotional discounts across a wide range of categories including food, health supplements, household goods, and toys for the period of February 25th to March 2nd.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of store prices, membership branding, and promotional sale text labels.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-information-density 'catalogue' style typical of social media marketing, relying on fast cuts and high-arousal narration to maintain viewer interest throughout the long list of items.
